title: Interview-maxxing protocol
description: Deck-based drills for getting from fundamentals to passable interview performance across algorithms, SQL, systems, networking, security, and behavioral scenarios.

decks.title: Algorithms (Python)
decks.description: Build passable interview fluency in Python through practical fundamentals: input parsing, pattern printing, numbers, strings, arithmetic, and arrays.

chapters.title: Input Parsing
chapters.focus: Read ints, strings, lists, and test cases without fumbling Python I/O.

chapters.title: Pattern Printing
chapters.focus: Build row/column thinking with classic star, number, and character patterns.

chapters.title: Numbers
chapters.focus: Master the standard number problems that show up constantly in beginner interviews.

chapters.title: String Manipulation
chapters.focus: Traverse, compare, rebuild, and inspect strings safely.

chapters.title: Arithmetic & Binary Conversion
chapters.focus: Work through number logic, divisibility, and base conversion step by step.

chapters.title: Arrays
chapters.focus: Scan, update, and summarize arrays without index mistakes.

decks.title: SQL
decks.description: Practice the query patterns that actually show up in interviews and analytics take-homes.

chapters.title: SELECT / WHERE / ORDER BY
chapters.focus: Filter and shape result sets correctly.

chapters.title: Joins
chapters.focus: Combine tables without dropping or duplicating rows by accident.

chapters.title: GROUP BY & Aggregates
chapters.focus: Summarize data at the right grain.

chapters.title: Subqueries
chapters.focus: Use nested filtering and derived sets.

chapters.title: CTEs
chapters.focus: Break long queries into readable steps.

chapters.title: Window Functions
chapters.focus: Rank, partition, and compute rolling stats.

chapters.title: Schema Design
chapters.focus: Pick stable table structure and keys.

chapters.title: Indexes & Tuning
chapters.focus: Know what makes a query fast or expensive.

decks.title: Server / Systems Administration
decks.description: Cover the operational basics needed to troubleshoot hosts, services, and routine production issues.

chapters.title: Linux Shell Basics
chapters.focus: Move confidently through a Unix-like system.

chapters.title: Files & Permissions
chapters.focus: Read, write, own, and protect files correctly.

chapters.title: Processes & Services
chapters.focus: Inspect, stop, restart, and diagnose running programs.

chapters.title: Package Management
chapters.focus: Install and update software with intent.

chapters.title: Logs & Debugging
chapters.focus: Use logs to form and test operational hypotheses.

chapters.title: Storage & Mounts
chapters.focus: Understand disks, space pressure, and mount points.

chapters.title: Monitoring
chapters.focus: Know what healthy vs unhealthy looks like.

chapters.title: Troubleshooting
chapters.focus: Work from symptom to root cause methodically.

decks.title: Networking
decks.description: Build the network model needed to debug common connectivity and web-service issues.

chapters.title: OSI / TCP-IP Basics
chapters.focus: Know what problem lives at which layer.

chapters.title: IP Addressing & Subnets
chapters.focus: Reason about hosts, ranges, and reachability.

chapters.title: DNS
chapters.focus: Translate names to addresses and debug resolution failures.

chapters.title: HTTP / HTTPS
chapters.focus: Understand request flow, status codes, and TLS basics.

chapters.title: Routing
chapters.focus: Know where packets go and why they do not arrive.

chapters.title: Load Balancing
chapters.focus: Distribute traffic without hiding bottlenecks.

chapters.title: Ports & Firewalls
chapters.focus: Allow intended traffic and block the rest.

chapters.title: Connectivity Debugging
chapters.focus: Use the right tool for the failing layer.

decks.title: Cybersecurity
decks.description: Focus on the practical security concepts that show up in engineering interviews and real systems work.

chapters.title: Authentication & Authorization
chapters.focus: Know who the user is and what they can do.

chapters.title: Common Vulnerabilities
chapters.focus: Spot high-frequency attack classes quickly.

chapters.title: Encryption Basics
chapters.focus: Understand what encryption actually protects.

chapters.title: Secrets Management
chapters.focus: Keep credentials out of places they do not belong.

chapters.title: Least Privilege
chapters.focus: Limit blast radius by default.

chapters.title: Secure Configuration
chapters.focus: Avoid dangerous defaults and exposed services.

chapters.title: Incident Response Basics
chapters.focus: Contain, investigate, and recover in order.

chapters.title: Threat Modeling
chapters.focus: Think through assets, actors, and abuse paths.

decks.title: Behavioral
decks.description: Scenario-based workplace judgment for interviews: what strong responses sound like, and why.

chapters.title: Ownership
chapters.focus: Take responsibility without being passive or performative.

chapters.title: Conflict Resolution
chapters.focus: Handle disagreement without making it personal.

chapters.title: Failure & Recovery
chapters.focus: Respond to mistakes with accountability and learning.

chapters.title: Leadership
chapters.focus: Influence outcomes without waiting for permission.

chapters.title: Prioritization
chapters.focus: Choose tradeoffs under pressure and constraint.

chapters.title: Ambiguity
chapters.focus: Create clarity when the path is not already given.

chapters.title: Communication
chapters.focus: Tailor the message to the audience and stakes.

chapters.title: Stakeholder Management
chapters.focus: Handle competing expectations like an adult at work.
